description_long: A cluster of five bananas is shown, joined together at the stem and fanning outward in a natural bunch. The bananas have a smooth, slightly glossy yellow peel with some greenish tinge near the stem and minor brown spots scattered across the surface, indicating natural handling and ripening. The peels are mostly intact, with no significant tears or splits, and the tips are slightly tapered and rounded. A commercial sticker is visible on one of the bananas, adding a touch of realism and suggesting it was purchased from a store. The bananas are arranged closely together, with their curved forms overlapping and creating a compact, organic shape. The overall appearance is fresh, with the bunch resting on a small piece of white paper or padding beneath it.
description: A bunch of five yellow bananas joined at the stem, with smooth peels, minor brown spots, and a visible commercial sticker. The bananas are slightly curved and closely packed together.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full bunch of bananas fanned out, with the sticker clearly visible and the stems clustered together at the top.
description_view_1: This view displays the bunch from the stem end, highlighting the convergence of all banana stems and the rounded tips of the bananas facing away.
description_view_2: A side view reveals the curvature of the bananas and the overlapping arrangement, with some brown spots and the greenish stem area visible.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the bananas from the opposite side, with the sticker still partially visible and the peels' smooth texture prominent.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana peels are mostly intact with a smooth surface, showing minor brown spots and slight blemishes but no significant tears or splits. The texture appears firm and unbroken, with only natural handling marks.
